title: Wolf bites woman in shock German attack on busy Hamburg shopping street
summary_full: It is believed to be the first wolf attack on a human since the animals began to reestablish themselves in Germany decades ago.
summary_public: It is believed to be the first wolf attack on a human since the animals began to reestablish themselves in Germany decades ago.
